\n<Naruto> \c[10] I'm so tired... and have nothing to do here.\

\n<Naruto> \c[10] I can't waste any minute, i'm too late.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] More or less, I think I can lock pick doors now.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] For real? and what are you waiting for? go ahead!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I cant waste any time, im too late.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] A note? Who put this here?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] An eviction notice, man the timing of this..\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] How the hell did this much time pass
since I last made a payment for rent?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] If that wasn't enough, I don't have my wallet
with me right now ..and I recently lent all my savings
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I think she's in her office by now.
I better hurry and go right now before she does something
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Obachan, thank God you are still here.
For a moment I was worried thinking you were at the casino.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] In the casin-...What are you talking about?
I've been working all day here in the office, don't be stupid.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Anyway... what brings you to my office?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, you remember a week ago you
borrowed money from me to pay off your lenders
and it was a matter of life or death? \
you see, they are very stubbon and evil people.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] So you haven't paid them yet?
Great, because I have a problem,
I need my money back right now, Obachan.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] You\..\..\.. ah... well... and about the money Naruto,
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Today I got an eviction notice and I need
to pay them by the end of the day. My savings should be
enough, so I came to ask you to pay it back to me. \
How long has it been since you've paid rent, didn't I tell you
to keep an eye on this type of thing?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Anyway, how much do you owe them?
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Ehhh...yeea well...you see, here it says...
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Whats wrong? Let me see that paper Naruto,
it can't be really that much.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Yeah well okay... here, take it.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] HOW THE FUCK DO YOU OWE 500,000 RYO,
WHEN IS THE LAST TIME YOU MADE A PAYMENT?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] HOW CAN YOU BE SO FOOLISH?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] WHAT IN TH-...WTF ARE YOU GONNA DO NOW?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Thats why I came here for my money!
With my savings it should be enough to pay the debt,
AND ON TOP OF THAT YOU CAME TO ASK ME FOR MONEY?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] What?! What do you mean by "what savings?"...
Did you forget about the money that I lent y-\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I TOLD YOU, I PAID MY LENDERS! I HAVE
\n<Naruto> \c[10] WHAT...? But just a moment ago you sa-\
there's no way he can pay that off...)\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] (But I can't leave him homeless either,
it would be too dangerous. If the Akatsuki commit to
stealing the 9-tailed fox, it will be far easier for them
to do so with Naruto's dumbass in the streets..)\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] (On the other hand I couldn't bear
to have Naruto here all day long in the office with me,
where I spend most of the day...)\
(...I guess I don't have many options)\
Alright Naruto, this is what we're gonna d-\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] You're going to beat up the landlord and
force him to let me live there permanently for free?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Thank you Obachan, you are the best!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] If you don't shut up, you will be
the one who is going to get a beating!\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Look, I don't have any money right
now and not much free time to attend to other business
outside my office, so let's make a deal.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I will let you temporarily stay at my house
until you can pay the rent again or otherwise find another
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] But! It's not gonna be free - you will
work for me as a payment for your stay. Is that clear?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] HOL UP.. not only did you lose
my money, but now I have to live with you and
work for you? ..Do you think I'm an idiot!?\
Do you think I like the idea of living with you?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Again, this ain't gonna be no free ride!
You're going to cook, clean the house and help me in the
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] You can either accept the deal
or live on the street - your choice.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (This has to be a joke, first she
steals my money and now she wants me to work for her for
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (No way, I'm not going to submit to her
bullshit, I'm going to force her to give me back my money!
Don't let her manipulate you like that Naruto! Believe it!)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (How the fuck did I let myself get
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] You'd better behave and keep your word,
otherwise you're going back out on the street.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Yes yes obachan whatever you say...
just tell me where I sleep and go back to your office.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] The guest bedroom is upstairs. And don't you dare
go into my room or you're going to wish you were dead.\
* You are tired AF and decide to go to sleep *
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, at least it is a decent room.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Tomorrow will be a new day, believe it!\
This is the end of the intro.
$gameSystem.showQuestPopup("New quest(s) unlocked!\nCheck the Ninja Path journal.", 300);

until I pay my debt off.\

They don't know that someday I will be hokage,

I'm going to help her right now\
